title: Software Engineer to Credit Decisions team

summary.lv: Swedbank meklē Software Engineer kredītu lēmumu komandai, lai attīstītu un uzturētu kritiski svarīgu aizdevumu risinājumu sistēmu.
summary.en: Swedbank seeks a Software Engineer for the Credit Decisions team to develop and maintain business-critical lending solutions as part of the Baltic Tech Modernization programme.
